title: athroandra membranacea
intro: Athroandra membranacea, also known as the Malaysian tree or Kambing tree, is a species of plant in the family Staphylocarpaceae. It is traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, particularly in Malaysia and Indonesia, for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Athroandra membranacea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for treating various health conditions. Athroandra membranacea is often prepared in herbal form, such as a decoction or infusion, to be used as a treatment for its various health benefits.
